en: She's not as pretty as she was when she was 29.
Miss Green would like to establish some ground rules before she comes out. She would appreciate it if you didn't use the words "old" or "downhill."
ko: 그린 양이 나오기 전에 몇 가지 기본 규칙을 정하고 싶다고 합니다. '늙은'이나 '내리막'이라는 단어를 쓰지 않아 주시면 감사하겠대요.

en: They still look pretty damn good.
Miss Green would like to establish some ground rules before she comes out.
ko: 그린 양이 나오기 전에 몇 가지 기본 규칙을 정하고 싶다고 합니다.

en: She would appreciate it if you didn't use the words "old" or "downhill."
